name: RightCapital Financial Planning API
what_it_does: RightCapital financial planning REST API for comprehensive goals-based financial planning, tax planning, and advisor workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage client financial plan creation with income, asset, and goal data for advisor planning automation, handle tax projection and Roth conversion optimization for tax-efficient retirement planning, access Medicare and healthcare cost planning for retirement healthcare expense automation, retrieve student loan optimization and repayment strategy modeling for debt planning automation, manage Social Security timing optimization and claiming strategy for retirement income planning, handle estate planning and legacy goal integration for comprehensive wealth planning, access insurance need analysis and coverage gap identification for protection planning automation, retrieve scenario comparison and stress testing for financial plan sensitivity analysis, manage account aggregation and linked financial data for comprehensive client financial picture, and integrate RightCapital with Orion, Redtail, Wealthbox, and custodian platforms.
use_cases: Creating financial plans from advisor planning agents
Optimizing tax strategy from tax planning agents
Modeling retirement healthcare from Medicare planning agents
Analyzing student loan options from debt strategy agents
not_for: Consumer financial planning without advisor intermediary
Institutional investment management without retail planning
best_when: An RIA using RightCapital wanting AI agents to automate financial plan creation, tax projection, Roth conversion analysis, Medicare planning, student loan optimization, and Social Security claiming strategy.
avoid_when: INVESTMENT ADVICE SUPERVISION REQUIRED: Automated financial plan generation constitutes investment advice requiring licensed investment adviser representative review before client delivery; automated plan delivery without supervision creates unsupervised investment advice and fiduciary violation. Tax advice limitations — automated tax projections use simplified assumptions; automated tax recommendations without CPA collaboration create unauthorized tax advice risk. Plan assumption disclosure — automated financial plans must disclose return, inflation, and longevity assumptions; automated plan delivery without assumption transparency creates misleading financial communication. Healthcare cost projection accuracy — automated Medicare and healthcare cost projections must use current premium and coverage data; stale healthcare cost data in automated plans creates retirement income adequacy miscalculation.

auth.notes: RightCapital uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Shelton, Connecticut HQ. Founded 2015. Private (venture-backed). Modern financial planning platform. 25,000+ advisor users. Strong in tax planning and healthcare cost modeling. RightCapital Academy for advisor education. Competes with MoneyGuidePro (Envestnet) and eMoney for financial planning software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-advisor monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-advisor monthly subscription; basic and premium tiers
pricing.notes: Shelton, Connecticut. Private, venture-backed. Founded 2015. 25,000+ advisor users. Tax and healthcare planning specialty.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; plan calculations may be compute-intensive

known_agent_gotchas: INVESTMENT ADVISER ACT SUPERVISION: Automated financial plan generation and delivery without licensed IAR review creates unsupervised investment advice; implement mandatory review gate before automated plan delivery to clients
No webhooks — plan calculation completion requires polling; no push notification for financial plan event or simulation completion

Healthcare cost data currency — automated Medicare and healthcare cost projections must use current year premium and IRMAA surcharge data; stale healthcare cost projections create retirement income adequacy underestimation for clients approaching Medicare age

Student loan regulatory changes — automated student loan optimization must use current SAVE/IDR plan rules and PSLF requirements; student loan repayment rules changed significantly 2020-2024; outdated rule set creates incorrect repayment strategy recommendations
Tax assumption transparency — automated tax projections must disclose assumed future tax rates; automated plans without tax assumption disclosure create unrealistic after-tax income projections

Scenario comparison data integrity — automated multi-scenario financial plan comparison must maintain consistent base assumptions across scenarios; inconsistent base data creates misleading plan comparisons
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial planning. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client financial plan and retirement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial planning. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Client financial and retirement data.
